.@SynScience is building AI co-scientists for end-to-end scientific research. Scientists can now delegate the full research loop: literature reviews, hypothesis generation, experiment runs on GPUs, analysis, and publication-ready drafts. Battle-tested on ML research, and… pic.

.@InviscidAI simulates how air, heat, and energy flow in real time. This lets facility operators cut energy costs by up to 30% and shrink design timelines from weeks to hours, across data centers, cold storage facilities, and commercial buildings. Congrats on the launch, @kabearj and @ziiiiiiiiiiming!

.@GenAstronautics builds autonomous robotics for space. In microgravity, proteins crystallize without defects and semiconductors form without flaws, but astronaut time is scarce. They are enabling scale for the work that can't be done anywhere else. Congrats on the launch, @BramSchork and @ShiboZhou!

.@polymath_labs is training world generation models to automate the creation of RL environments. Traditionally, RL environment generation has been bottlenecked by human data. Superintelligence will never be achieved by human data alone. Polymath is building the core technology… pic.

ShortKit lets every app roll their own TikTok-quality feed. Built by a former YT infra engineer, ShortKit's managed SDKs and video infra lets teams roll best-in-class short form video experiences, without needing their in-house video eng teams. Congrats on the launch, @neilbhammar and @michaelmahersel!

.@Aemon_ai is the AI R&D engineer. Give it a problem and a way to measure success, it then discovers optimal solutions, often going beyond what human experts can find. They just set a new record on circle packing — a classic NP-hard problem — with less than $10 of compute. Learn… pic.

.@ResslAI deploys AI employees at field ops businesses to automate their office work - responding to leads, booking jobs, sending estimates, etc. Their agents sit on existing software and increase operating margins. Congrats on the launch, @arushi_ressl and @AbhishekEswaran!… pic.

AI agents are trapped in chat bubbles. @usecarson breaks free by generating custom, task specific interfaces with enterprise-grade security. Sign up today at . Congrats on the launch, @sidharthkmenon, @_ketan0, @alex_iansiti, and @milanb_123!

RT by @ycombinator: 1/ Introducing NanoGPT Slowrun 🐢: an open repo for state-of-the-art data-efficient learning algorithms. It's built for the crazy ideas that speedruns filter out -- expensive optimizers, heavy regularization, SGD replacements like evolutionary search. pic.

.@OneRobotHQ builds world model-based simulations that are realistic to see and realistic to interact with, so robotics teams can train and evaluate VLAs without being bottlenecked by robot time. Congrats on the launch, @hsarabu_ and @eltonbear6996!

Foreign daily net-selling in KOSPI today hits the highest on record, led by profit-taking in Tech (-$5.2bn, record high daily net-selling in both Hynix and Sammy today). Retail investors were the main buyers in KOSPI today, and net bought the most in Tech (+$4.5bn).
US courts are averaging more than six big bankruptcies per week, per Bloomberg.
Japan's Yen's purchasing power is at a 53-year low, per Nikkei.
BREAKING: Former President Bill Clinton is due to testify behind closed doors to a congressional panel about his ties to the late sex offender Jeffrey Epstein, per Reuters.

The Pentagon is reportedly in discussions with major AI labs about developing AI-driven cyber capabilities targeting China, including automated mapping of critical infrastructure networks such as power grids and utilities to identify vulnerabilities and support U.S. military planning, per FT.
